title: Tender Briny Egyptian Snapper Fish Stir fry
description: A cozy Egyptian dish featuring snapper fish in a stir-fry, perfect for a sugar-free friendly meal. This recipe combines the freshness of the sea with the warmth of Egyptian spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the coriander, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the snapper fish fillets to the skillet, skin side up if they have skin.
Cook the fish for 3-4 minutes on the first side, or until it is golden brown.
Flip the fish over and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, or until it is cooked through.
Remove the fish from the skillet and set it aside on a plate.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the fish and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the fish hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
